contextkit-core.description: Run core ContextKit operations with modes: summarize, compress-context, handoff, extract-profile, or memory-enrichment.

endpoint.description: Core operation to run. Defaults to summarize.

messages.description: Conversation messages for the selected operation.

role.description: Message role: user, assistant, system, or tool.

contextId.description: Optional uploaded ContextKit context ID for large payloads. Use /api/context/upload first.

mode.description: Summarize mode or profile mode. Summarize defaults to compact.

state.description: Structured state for summarize, compress, and handoff modes.

contextkit-experience-write.description: Compile verified skills, validate/push immutable source bundles, or publish executable skill repository versions.

mode.description: Compile a draft, validate/push its versioned file bundle, or publish an approved executable repository version.

experience.description: Legacy input record. New skill drafts are compiled from messages and validated before publishing.

actionTaken.description: What the agent tried or changed.

messages.description: Optional source messages to convert into an experience record.

contextId.description: Optional uploaded ContextKit context ID for large payloads.

minConfidence.description: Minimum confidence required for experience-consider to save a private draft.

autoSave.description: Whether skill-compile should save a private SKILL.md draft when completed reusable work passes evidence checks.

skillId.description: Private verified skill ID for skill-publish mode. Explicit user approval is required before calling publish.

repository.description: Lowercase kebab-case repository name. Must match the compiled skill name.

version.description: Immutable semantic version matching the compiled skill and skill.json.

files.description: Complete repository files for skill-validate or skill-push. Unsafe paths, secrets, install hooks, and incomplete executable bundles are rejected.

path.description: POSIX path relative to repository root.

content.description: UTF-8 text or base64 file content.

mode.description: Normalized Git-style file mode: 0644 or executable 0755.

publishToken.description: Capability returned with a Bankr-hosted private draft. Required with skillId when publishing through the shared hosted endpoint.

userApproved.description: Required in skill-publish mode. Confirms the user explicitly approved public listing.

priceUsd.description: Fixed v1 marketplace price for a verified skill.

experience.description: Private compiled draft or published verified skill record.

publishToken.description: Returned only for a new Bankr-hosted private draft; required to publish that draft.

validation.description: Quality score, contract-test results, findings, and publish eligibility.

repository.description: Content-addressed immutable bundle manifest with SHA-256 checksums.

stored.description: False for validation-only; true after an accepted immutable push.

contextkit-experience-search.description: Search or inspect verified ContextKit skill repositories without exposing paid source files.

mode.description: Search the marketplace or inspect one skill manifest.

query.description: Search query or current agent problem.

ecosystems.description: Filter by Bankr, x402, Base, MCP, wallet, DeFi, automation, LLM gateway, or agent infrastructure.

compatibility.description: Filter by Bankr, Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, Cursor, or another compatible host.

contextId.description: Optional uploaded ContextKit context ID to search from.

contextkit-experience-buy.description: Buy or clone a verified skill repository through Bankr x402, including all files and SHA-256 checksums.

mode.description: Both modes settle access and return the full installable bundle when available.

skillId.description: Verified skill ID. Either skillId or listingId is accepted.

buyerId.description: Required stable pseudonymous buyer identity, for example agent:team-42. Reuse it for permanent access; never send an email, secret, or spoofed ContextKit account ID.

buyerContext.description: Optional current task context for matching.

contextId.description: Optional uploaded ContextKit context ID for buyer context.

installBundle.description: Legacy SKILL.md or a complete versioned repository containing every file, manifest, checksums, and safe materialization instructions.
